title: AgentMachineReceipt
description: Runtime evidence emitted by Agent Machine after probing, placement, execution, cache reuse, model load/unload, or policy-mediated side-effect handling.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

machineRef.description: Agent Machine URN that emitted the receipt.

receiptClass.description: Class of runtime event this receipt records.

issuedAt.description: Timestamp when the receipt was issued.

taskRef.description: Optional AgentPlane task, run, or work item reference associated with this receipt.

agentPodRef.description: Optional AgentPod URN associated with the runtime placement.

placementFactRefs.description: PlacementFact URNs used for this receipt.

modelResidencyRefs.description: ModelResidency URNs observed or changed during this receipt.

inferenceProviderRefs.description: InferenceProvider URNs used or probed during this receipt.

policyDecisionRef.description: PolicyDecision URN authorizing, denying, or constraining this runtime action.

metrics.description: Optional runtime metrics captured by the receipt.

evidenceHash.description: Hash of the canonical receipt evidence payload or bundle.

evidenceRefs.description: Additional evidence URNs or hashes for logs, probes, run capsules, and artifacts.
